one_time_description: Correction of an error - revenue sharing agreements revenue was understated in the prior year, resulting in an increase in total assets and revenues of $465,030
economic_notes: Nation operates economic development segment focused on economic opportunities, investment promotion and economic development planning. Partially owns Pelltiq't Energy Group Ltd. at 25% (equity method). Logging income and contracting income reported. BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing received.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Six fully consolidated subsidiaries: Cougar Point Development Incorporated, High Bar Resources & Development LLP, Spirit Valley Development Limited Partnership, Spirit Valley Development GP Ltd., Cougar Point Holdings Ltd., Cougar Point Holdings Limited Partnership. One equity-method GBE: Pelltiq't Energy Group Ltd. (25% owned). Prior year restated for correction of error ($465,030 revenue sharing understatement). Prior year also had significant revenue sharing agreements of $2,920,400 which dropped to nil in current year. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $435,243 + Government of Canada $1,591,748 + Province of BC $1,311,057 + BCFN Gaming $405,986 + Shuswap Nation Tribal Council $224,303 + First Nations Health Authority $17,000 = $3,985,337. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Deferred revenue closed to nil at year end. Portfolio investments of $6,006,988 held with Credential Securities and fixed income.
